title: limeum katangense
intro: Limeum katangense is a medicinal plant species belonging to the Limeum genus, native to the Democratic Republic of Congo. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Limeum katangense is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced wound healing. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
